title: alyxia linearis
intro: Alyxia linearis, also known as the Sea Mallow, is a plant species within the Apocynaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain a compound called alyxine, a toxic alkaloid that has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and aiding in digestion, among others. Alyxia linearis is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, with the seeds being the primary ingredient used in herbal preparations.
